title: Wrova Plastic Bowl Sets 8 PCS Unbreakable Cereal Bowl 26 OZ Microwave and Dishwasher Safe Bowl Sets for Camping and Picnic Lightweight Kitchen Bowls for Serving Soup, Oatmeal and Fruit - Multi
features: MATERIAL SELECTION: Wrova cereal bowls set of 8 are constructed with food-grade PP, BPA free, non-toxi. Additionally, these kitchen bowls are anti-scald,anti-cold

ELEGANT DESIGN: Enjoy a more comfortable dining experience with our plastic bowls. Featuring thicker and smoother round edges, they feel great to hold and use. With a generous 26oz capacity, they're perfect for everyday use at home, work or school
LIGHTWEIGHT & UNBREAKABLE: Made from food grade pp material, these 8 vibrant cereal bowls are perfect for everyday use and will not break easily like ceramic alternatives

MICROWAVE & DISHWASHER SAFE: Our bowls made from food grade pp are both microwave and dishwasher safe, making them effortless to clean and reducing your kitchen chores. With a temperature resistance of up to 248°F (120℃), they're ideal for your daily meals and snacks

VERSATILE USAGE: Suitable for indoors and outdoors, these 26 oz bowl sets are perfect for any occasion, parties, picnics, camping, and everyday meals at home, school, office, or traveling. Also a great gift for new apartment and dorm
